warnings: W001: cli-explore-agent failed twice with FOREIGN KEY constraint failed.
W002: maestro delegate analysis timed out after starting execution opc-085511-f7f4.
All recommendations are marked LOW/MEDIUM confidence unless also supported by blueprint or code anchors.

findings.title: Current model is authored scenario data, not a recommender rule system.
Current UI is single-path with a permanent right detail panel.
Validation patterns exist and can be extended to sourceRef and route-state validation.
Test harness exists but Phase 2 will need new coverage for rules, branch interaction, and persistence.

technical_solutions.solution: Introduce typed rule/data helpers before UI replacement.
technical_solutions.problem: Canvas UI needs a stable recommendation and route-state contract.
technical_solutions.rationale: Keeps Phase 2 implementation incremental and testable.
technical_solutions.alternatives: Directly rewrite App first; rejected due to higher regression risk.
technical_solutions.next_action: Planner should create rule/schema task before canvas rendering task.

technical_solutions.solution: Keep MVP state simulated and local; defer real state parsing and sharing backend.
technical_solutions.rationale: Blueprint NFR-002 and roadmap both define static/local MVP boundary.
technical_solutions.alternatives: Parse real .workflow/state.json now; rejected as deferred/non-goal.
technical_solutions.next_action: Planner should explicitly exclude backend/share work.
